name: JosiDog Mini 18kg
description: Composition: whole grain corn; dried poultry protein; rice; beet fibre; dried duck protein; poultry fat; hydrolysed poultry protein; maize protein; minerals; yeast; ground chicory root (natural source of inulin); dried meat from the New Zealand green-lipped mussel (Perna canaliculus). Product Details: Suitable kibble size for small dog breeds. The extra-small kibble of JosiDog Mini offers maximum enjoyment for dogs of small breeds. The gluten-free formula is packed with the best nutrients that support healthy skin and a shiny coat. Complete feed for adult dogs.
